92 I1R I1R_APHASIA 25b(I1r)Aphasia CHAR 1 Indicates the diagnosis of aphasia - a speech or language disorder caused by disease or injury to the brain resulting in difficulty expressing thoughts (spoken or written) or understanding spoken or written language. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
93 I1S I1S_CEREBRAL_PALSY 25c(I1s)Cerebral Palsy CHAR 1 Indicates the diagnosis of Cerebral Palsy - a paralysis related to developmental brain defects or birth trauma. 0 =
